description:
Add a mail account to Thunderbird for 'Helpdesk Agent' (helpdesk@internal.cyber-corp.local) using password 'Welcome2026!'. Manually configure the account with the settings below and ensure the configuration is saved to the profile regardless of connection test results.

Incoming (IMAP):
- Hostname: imap.internal.cyber-corp.local
- Port: 143
- Connection security: STARTTLS
- Authentication method: Normal password
- Username: helpdesk_user

Outgoing (SMTP):
- Hostname: smtp.internal.cyber-corp.local
- Port: 587
- Connection security: STARTTLS
- Authentication method: Normal password
- Username: helpdesk_user
